title: Inner Views Art Exhibition
description: A collective musing on home, family, and community by fourteen contemporary artists. A quiet, contemplative show that's perfect for slow strolls and conversation between two people who like to talk about what they're seeing.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta (2000s Era)
description: Adults-only evening at the zoo with cocktails, live music, and roaming animals after hours. Great date energy: walk, drink, listen to live music, and feel like kids again without the kids. Themed night with curated bites and bars throughout the grounds.

title: Steel Pulse (Legendary Reggae) at The Eastern
location: The Eastern, 800 Old Flat Shoals Rd SE
description: Grammy-winning UK reggae legends Steel Pulse bring their politically conscious roots reggae to Atlanta. The Eastern is a fantastic mid-size venue — close enough to feel the bass, big enough to dance. Ideal for couples who like to move.

title: Dinner & A Date: Night of Soul Live Music
description: An intimate, dinner-and-show experience built around soul music. Designed specifically for date nights — sit-down seating, food, and a tight set list. Black-owned venue in West Midtown, very date-friendly atmosphere.

title: PHYSIQUE 2026 Opening Reception (Juried Art Show)
location: Kai Lin Art, 999 Brady Ave NW
description: Kai Lin Art's first-ever juried exhibition opening reception. Crowds, complimentary drinks, and the kind of Westside art-scene buzz that makes for easy mingling and conversation. Show runs through September 11, so you can return.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia
description: Back-to-school themed vegan festival with food vendors, tattoo artists, and live music. For plant-based couples or anyone curious, it's a low-key Saturday afternoon of grazing, listening to music, and people-watching.

title: Jazz Affair: Live Jazz Night
description: From the Dinner & A Date crew — an intimate jazz night designed for couples. Dim lighting, good music, and a built-in date-night crowd means you don't have to pretend you're not there together. Cocktails flow.

title: Reggae After Dark (Free Entry + Drink Specials)
price: Free entry, free drink until 11 PM
description: Late-night reggae vibes in O4W with drink specials and a young, mixed crowd. A great 'we just got out of dinner' follow-up if you're the kind of couple that likes to keep the night going past midnight.

title: Afro Caribbean vs Hip Hop & R&B at Embr Lounge
price: Free entry until midnight with RSVP
description: A dance-floor showdown between Afro-Caribbean and Hip Hop/R&B sounds. Embr Lounge is a date-friendlier late-night spot than most — indoor and outdoor space, good cocktails, and DJs that know how to read a room.

title: Butterfly Encounter Date Night
description: Curated date night inside the butterfly conservatory at CNC. Hand-feeding butterflies in a glass conservatory at golden hour is one of the most underrated romantic things you can do within an hour of Atlanta. Drive up to Roswell afterward for dinner on Canton St.

title: James 'Murr' Murray (Impractical Jokers) Live
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta
description: James Murray from Impractical Jokers brings his stand-up tour to Alpharetta. Date-night gold: easy to talk about during dinner, you already share inside jokes from the show, and Helium has a full food and cocktail menu.

title: The E.A.V. Comedy Show
description: Stand-up showcase produced by All Day Lunch Break in the back room of El Sótano. Cheap, intimate, and reliably good — East Atlanta has a walkable strip of bars and restaurants so you can keep the night going afterward.

title: Sun Havana Nights: Salsa, Bachata & Latin Dancing
time: Class 7:00 PM | Social dancing until late
description: Beginner-friendly salsa and bachata lesson followed by open social dancing. Designed for people who 'don't dance' — by the end of the class you will, and you'll have something silly to laugh about together for the next six months.

title: Noah Kahan: The Great Divide Tour
description: Folk-pop favorite Noah Kahan with opener Gigi Perez at the battery. Stadium show energy with deeply singalong-able songs — if you and your date both already know the album, this is the kind of shared live-music memory that sticks.

title: Isamu Noguchi: 'I am not a designer' at the High
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE
description: Major retrospective of sculptor Isamu Noguchi, organized by the High. A perfect 'inside afternoon' date — Midtown, easy parking, coffee at the museum café, and enough sculpture to spark real conversation.

title: Amy Sherald: American Sublime at the High Museum
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE
description: Most comprehensive exhibition to date for Georgia native Amy Sherald (the painter of Michelle Obama's official portrait). The final stop of a national tour — once it's gone, it's gone. Pair with dinner on Peachtree after.

title: Cocktails in the Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE
description: Thursday-evening cocktail series among the garden beds. Walk, drink, and watch the city light up against the Midtown skyline. One of the easiest, most reliable date nights Atlanta offers — book the early dinner, then stroll over.

title: Viernes Tropicales: Latin Night at Sanctuary
description: Weekly Friday Latin night with reggaeton, salsa, and bachata under one roof. Bigger dance floor, broader crowd, and a great option if you want a real night out rather than a quiet one.

title: The Fray & Dashboard Confessional: Summer of Light Tour
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Two early-2000s emo-pop staples on one bill at Chastain Park. Outdoor amphitheater, picnic-friendly — bring a blanket and wine, lean into the nostalgia. If you two bonded over these songs in college, this is the date.

title: O.A.R. Three Decades Tour at Chastain
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: O.A.R. celebrates 30 years with a full-band set at Chastain. Jam-band-adjacent, very singalong-able, and Chastain's outdoor setting is hard to beat for a summer evening date. VIP upgrades available for a more splurgy version.
